headline: Amazon Globalstar Talks Put Satellite Push And Valuation In New Focus
summary: Amazon.com (NasdaqGS:AMZN) is reportedly in advanced talks to acquire satellite telecom company Globalstar. The potential deal would expand Amazon's presence in satellite communications beyond its existing Project Kuiper plans. Apple is a significant equity holder in Globalstar, adding a competitive and partnership angle to any transaction. For you as an investor, this potential move puts Amazon's satellite ambitions in a different light. The company is already building out Project Kuiper...

headline: Satellite Operator Globalstar Rallies on Report That Amazon Is in Buyout Talks
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Globalstar Inc. shares rose in pre-market trading after a Financial Times report that Amazon.com Inc. is in talks to acquire the satellite provider. The deal would bolster Amazon’s effort to build its own satellite operation, the newspaper reported, citing unidentified people with knowledge of the discussions. summary: Amazon is reportedly in talks to acquire satellite telecommunications company Globalstar.  Globalstar stock rocketed higher Thursday morning while Amazon shares fell premarket.  Globalstar has a market capitalization of just under $9 billion as of Wednesday's close.

content.title: Globalstar Stock Jumps After Report Amazon Is In Talks To Acquire Satellite Firm
content.summary: Amazon is reportedly in talks to acquire satellite telecommunications company Globalstar.  Globalstar stock rocketed higher Thursday morning while Amazon shares fell premarket.  Globalstar has a market capitalization of just under $9 billion as of Wednesday's close.

headline: US jobless aid filings fall to 202,000 as layoffs remain low despite uncertainty of Iran war
summary: U.S. applications for unemployment benefits fell last week as layoffs remain sparse despite a softening labor market and rising energy costs due to the Iran war.  The number of Americans applying for jobless aid for the week ending March 28 fell by 9,000 to 202,000 from the previous week’s 211,000, the Labor Department reported Thursday.  Filings for unemployment benefits are considered representative of U.S. layoffs and are close to a real-time indicator of the health of the job market.

content.title: US jobless aid filings fall to 202,000 as layoffs remain low despite uncertainty of Iran war

The number of Americans applying for jobless aid for the week ending March 28 fell by 9,000 to 202,000 from the previous week’s 211,000, the Labor Department reported Thursday.  Filings for unemployment benefits are considered representative of U.S. layoffs and are close to a real-time indicator of the health of the job market.

Yahoo Finance's "Market Madness" tournament has whittled the competition down to its Elite Eight, which includes McDonald's (MCD), Amazon (AMZN), JPMorgan Chase (JPM), Coinbase (COIN), Palantir Technologies (PLTR), Walmart (WMT), Alphabet (GOOG, GOOGL), and Tesla (TSLA).

Explosive Options technical analyst Bob Lang sits down with Market Catalysts Host Brooke DiPalma to share his game plan around two key match-ups and explain his analysis on which companies come out on top.

headline: Delta Picks Bezos Over Musk For Satellite Wi-Fi As SpaceX's $1.75 Trillion IPO Looms
summary: Delta Air Lines Inc signed a deal with Amazon.com Inc’s Leo to bring low-Earth orbit satellite Wi-Fi to 500 aircraft starting in 2028. The deal snubs SpaceX’s Starlink as the rocket company reportedly moves toward filing what could be the largest IPO ever. Why Amazon Over Starlink Delta chose Amazon Leo because of its existing relationship with Amazon Web Services, which already powers the airline’s internal systems. The service promises download speeds up to 1 gbps per aircraft and will be free

content.title: Delta Picks Bezos Over Musk For Satellite Wi-Fi As SpaceX's $1.75 Trillion IPO Looms

Why Amazon Over Starlink Delta chose Amazon Leo because of its existing relationship with Amazon Web Services, which already powers the airline’s internal systems. The service promises download speeds up to 1 gbps per aircraft and will be free

headline: Amazon must negotiate with Staten Island warehouse workers, NLRB says
summary: Amazon must negotiate with a labor union representing some 5,000 workers at a ‌company warehouse on Staten Island, the National Labor Relations Board ruled ‌on Wednesday.  The ruling means Amazon is required to meet with representatives of the Amazon ​Labor Union, which formed in 2022 and has been seeking to negotiate with Amazon over pay, working conditions and other matters.  The union was initially formed independently but has since aligned with the International Brotherhood of Teamsters.

content.title: Amazon must negotiate with Staten Island warehouse workers, NLRB says
content.summary: Amazon must negotiate with a labor union representing some 5,000 workers at a ‌company warehouse on Staten Island, the National Labor Relations Board ruled ‌on Wednesday.  The ruling means Amazon is required to meet with representatives of the Amazon ​Labor Union, which formed in 2022 and has been seeking to negotiate with Amazon over pay, working conditions and other matters.  The union was initially formed independently but has since aligned with the International Brotherhood of Teamsters.

headline: Elon Musk Says Relying on the Strait of Hormuz Is ‘Lazy’ but What Can We Really Do to Change?
summary: The U.S. war in Iran has led to a global energy crisis, and world leaders are scrambling to reopen the Strait of Hormuz. But if governments want to establish energy independence, they're going to have to invest elsewhere.
